description: Legal <onIdle> declaration (§51.0.R). A single <onIdle after=5m to=.Idle/> at engine-root scope, to= a real Phase variant: compiles clean (no E-IDLE-MISPLACED / E-IDLE-INVALID-VARIANT / E-IDLE-DUPLICATE). RUNTIME HALF IS HARNESS-GATED: the watchdog arming at module-init, resetting on each transition, and firing after 5m of silence cannot be exercised because the conformance harness has NO virtual clock (driver.ts drives selector events + settle only). The watchdog runtime is a PA/infra follow-on on a virtual-clock driver.
rationale: §51.0.R a single well-formed engine-root <onIdle> with a valid for=-variant to= compiles without diagnostics; the arm/reset/fire watchdog runtime is not assertable without a virtual clock.
runtime-half-ref: virtual-clock driver (no clock in conformance/driver.ts:19-21; timers deferred to v1.next) — idle-watchdog fire is a PA/infra follow-on
